note: Curated snapshot of provider config + a few representative models per provider. Intentionally carries NO live model COUNTS — those drift constantly and rot the docs. For the current, full inventory run `python3 scripts/compare.py --list-models <provider>` (needs that provider's API key); this file and `--list-models` are the source of truth for model inventories, while SKILL.md stays conceptual. The provider set here is kept in sync with `PROVIDERS` in scripts/compare.py by tests/test_providers_snapshot.py.

nvidia.verify_alive: NVIDIA's /v1/models lists many entries but most return 404/410 when called — verify a model with a simple completion first. See references/provider-tool-support.md.

openrouter.confirm_before_use: Paid, per-token. Confirm with the user before any OpenRouter call.
